svg.title: BPC-157: evidence by research level
svg.desc: Bar chart comparing research levels discussed on the PepExact BPC-157 evidence page: extensive animal and laboratory research, small limited human reports, and no established approved clinical use as of 17 July 2026.
svg.text: Qualitative summary from the PepExact evidence guide · Reviewed 17 July 2026
Laboratory and animal research  extensive preclinical footprint
Bars are illustrative of relative evidence volume described on the page, not effect sizes.
Publishers may reuse this graphic with a visible source credit to PepExact. Please link to the original evidence page so readers can inspect the sources and current status.
